I'm just disappointed in the lack of creativity online no1 makes accessories with screens other than fan controllers lol. I really want a media controller like a car stereo for my PC."}
{"text":"Any luck with finding any cool front bay devices in 2020? This video makes me so jealous."}

{"text":"Are there stereos smaller than single DIN, that might fit into a 5.25 inch DVD drive bay on PC??? Fan controllers as far as the eye can see but no physical media controls seem to exist for a desktop PC."}

{"text":"VIVA LA 5.25 inch bay! We need more cool devices to put in there, it's a dying breed. I really want to make a housing for a raspberry pi display or find something wth physical volume knobs for the front of my PC."}

{"text":"Hello from Canada, I am very interested in supporting new/interesting devices for 5.25 inch bays. It's a very sad landscape right now, I really want an audio visualizer for the front of my PC!!!"}
